Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractCollectionValidator<S,C extends Collection<E>,E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,C>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractCollectionValidator<S,C,E>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
C - the type of the collection
E - the type of elements in the collection
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,C,E>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,C>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CollectionValidatorImpl, ListValidatorImpl
public abstract class AbstractCollectionValidator<S,C extends Collection<E>,E> extends AbstractObjectValidator<S,C> implements ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,C,E>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleCollectionValidator.

    Method
    Description

    asArray(Class<E> type)
    Returns a validator for the actual value as an array.

    Ensures that the actual value contains an element.

    Ensures that the actual value contains an element.

    Ensures that the actual value contains all of the specified elements.

    Ensures that the actual value contains all of the specified elements.

    Ensures that the actual value contains exactly the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more.

      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleCollectionValidator
      Ensures that the actual value contains an element.

      Parameters:

    • contains

      public S contains(E element, String name)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleCollectionValidator
      Ensures that the actual value contains an element.
      Specified by:
      contains in interface ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      element - the element that must exist
      name - the name of the expected element
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • containsExactly

      public S containsExactly(Collection<E> expected)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleCollectionValidator
      Ensures that the actual value contains exactly the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more. This method is equivalent to an equality comparison that ignores element ordering.
      Specified by:
      containsExactly in interface ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      expected - the elements that must exist
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • containsExactly

      public S containsExactly(Collection<E> expected, String name)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleCollectionValidator
      Ensures that the actual value contains exactly the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more. This method is equivalent to an equality comparison that ignores element ordering.
      Specified by:
      containsExactly in interface ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      expected - the elements that must exist
      name - the name of the expected elements
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • size

      public S size(Consumer<SizeValidator> consumer)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleCollectionValidator
      Validates nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Specified by:
      size in interface ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      consumer - validates the collection's size
      Returns:
      the updated validator
